testcase.name: test_full_diagnostic_flow

failure.message: AssertionError: Follow-up chat failed after retries: No response assert (<Response [520]> is not None and 520 == 200) + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_alexis_api.py:269: in test_full_diagnostic_flow assert chat2_response is not None and chat2_response.status_code == 200, f"Follow-up chat failed after retries: {chat2_response.status_code if chat2_response else 'No response'}" E AssertionError: Follow-up chat failed after retries: No response E assert (<Response [520]> is not None and 520 == 200) E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
